YOUR VOICE

Bold, limited-edition streetwear that bridges art and urban culture. Ethically produced. Globally expressed.

THE COLLECTION

12 PIECES
470gsm

Our signature fabric weight defines the Olympus standard. 470gsm is a heavyweight construction renowned for its robustness, premium hand-feel, and lasting durability — built for the streets, made to endure. The density ensures every piece retains its structure through years of wear, making it the ideal choice for those who demand both luxury and longevity.

Opting for 470gsm fabric is a commitment to a more luxurious feel and appearance — a garment that commands presence. Select pieces in our range feature this standard, denoted clearly on each product card.
